top_signals.title: Japan and China’s top diplomats hold first chat since Takaichi’s Taiwan remarks
top_signals.summary: Foreign Minister Toshimitsu Motegi said Thursday he had spoken briefly with his Chinese counterpart, Wang Yi, a day earlier on the sidelines of ASEAN-related meetings in Manila.

top_signals.title: Stocks Fall as Alphabet Stokes AI Spending Fears: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks fell as unease over ever-higher artificial intelligence investment outweighed an otherwise strong earnings report from Alphabet Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Federal agencies broaden alert on Iran-linked OT attacks
top_signals.summary: The observed incidents include “malicious project file interactions and manipulation of data on human machine interface (HMI) and supervisory control and data acquisition (SCADA) displays,” the advisory says.

top_signals.title: LG to Ban Residential Proxies from Smart TV Apps
top_signals.summary: The home appliance giant LG Electronics USA said this week it plans to suspend any apps built for its smart TVs that turn one's television into an always-on residential proxy node. The move comes less than a month after researchers found that more than 42 percent of games and other apps available for download on LG's webOS store allow unknown third-parties to route their Internet traffic through a user's TV.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Adobe Chrome extension flaw let sites access private WhatsApp chats
top_signals.summary: The Adobe Acrobat extension for Chrome could be used to access conversations and data rendered in WhatsApp Web without any form of authentication. [...]
